calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Robyn Roberts to appear on May 7, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robyn Roberts for Petitioner.

Ms. Roberts stated that there was no contact from Mr. Keck's Client and that there was no response from Mr. Keck. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited powers and bond set in the amount of $20,000.00 (subject to review of the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Continued To Jul-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robyn Roberts for Kindred Nursing Centers West.

Ms. Roberts stated that she requested information from Mr. Keck with regard to there being no assets and that she has not heard or recevied anything. The matter was continued to July 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if Mr. Keck's Client is interested in being appointed and provide information.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Continued To Jun-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Continued To Jun-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Continued To May-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Keck specially appearing for Everline Watson. Robyn Roberts for Kindred Nursing Centers West, LLC.

Mr. Keck stated that there were no other assets in the Estate, that he provided a copy of the Joint Tenancy Deed, a copy of the Affidavit of Death of Joint Tenant, that Ms. Watson indicated that the other Siblings did not want to get involved and that his Client has not filed a petition to be appointed. Ms. Roberts stated that she has asked for information about the assets. The Court suggested Counsel meet and discuss exchanging of information. The matter was continued to May 11, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
